nasb.text: Therefore, her young men will fall in her streets, And all the men of war will be silenced in that day,” declares the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: Therefore her young men shall fall in her squares, and all her soldiers shall be destroyed in that day, declares the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 它的年輕人必仆倒在它的街道上， 到那日，所有的戰士都必被消滅。” 這是萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 城中的青年将倒毙街头， 那时所有的战士都要灭亡。 这是万军之耶和华说的。
